greeting: The doctor does not look up from his mortar at first. "Sit if you are bleeding. Speak if you are not. I can attend to one of you at a time."
shrug: "Outside my practice, which is bodies and what troubles them."
deflect: "A physician keeps confidences. It is most of the job."

entries.text: "Silas Ward, doctor of physic, Edinburgh trained, Cumberland resigned. The TOWN and I have an understanding: it keeps hurting itself, I keep charging."
"Fevers, fractures, teeth when the smith is busy. And I compound my own remedies, which is why my patients live and my prices sting."
"A drowning is water in the lungs, and I report what I find. What I found, I reported." His pestle grinds a little faster. "Boots dry as a sermon. I reported that too. Nobody thanked me."
"A mercy in measured drops and a thief in bottles. I measure carefully. For everyone in my care, I measure very carefully."

entries.deflect: "My name, sir. Wear it out and buy another."
entries.text: He sets the pestle down entirely. "A ward. Yes. You have learned to hear the pun, which means you have learned other things." A long look at the locked cabinet. "Some patients must be kept from what they see, friend. You may judge me when you have sat up nights with one of them."
